title: MASEMiner
tagline: Extract effect sizes or factor loadings for Meta-Analytic SEM — configure direct vs indirect on the next step.
description: MASEMiner — pairwise effect-sizes variant.  Extracts pairwise effect sizes (and the reliability + instrument metadata reported with them) into a flat `records[]` array per sample, plus coded study metadata.  The sibling factor-loadings variant extracts factor loadings and inter-factor correlations instead.
task_description: Extract every reported pairwise effect size (with canonical and verbatim variable labels, sample size, reliability, and instrument metadata) and coded study/sample metadata for every sample reported in the paper.
context: MASEMiner workflow for primary studies that report effect sizes directly (correlation matrices, prose-reported correlations, or other bivariate effect-size statistics).
